title: astragalus vallaris
intro: Astragalus vallaris, also known as the vallaris or Indian milk pea, is a flowering plant in the legume family. It is native to India and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Astragalus vallaris is typically prepared as a decoction or powder for herbal remedies, and is also used in some modern supplements to support overall well-being.
